refnamediv.refpurpose: Match an image histogram to a reference.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imhistmatch(image, reference) out = imhistmatch(image, reference, bins)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Maps image intensities using cumulative histogram matching. The result is double-valued in the range 0 to 1.

refsection.title: Examples
